title: I AM LIMITLESS Conference 2021
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
I AM LIMITLESS Conference 2021
What is the I AM LIMITLESS Conference?
Key notes
How To Build Your Social Impact Career？
Speaker: Fan Zhang, CSR expert, former Director, CSR and sustainability at Kuaishou
“As a college student at school, you have much room to try and make mistakes. You can start from small, such as organize movie clubs, seminars and try all sorts of different things according to your interests. In such a process, organizational skills, leadership, communication skills and ability to integrate resources will be fully exercised.”
Social Impact In The Era Of COVID 19: Finding Innovative Solutions To Improve Global Health Access
Speaker: Chang Liu, Regional Director for Greater China and Southeast Asia at ACCESS Health International.
“Positive reinforcement is the key. I really encourage you to build up a positive personal story about yourself and about the others in your life, and keep telling those positive stories to yourself and to others.”
Connecting The Dots: Fostering Intercultural Understanding Through Travel
Speaker: Yu Gong, Partner, Daocaoren (稻草人)Travel Group
“A core aspect of traveling is to create connections between you and yourself. The connection is a continuous process of breaking the old, learning the new and finally gaining the power to grow. People can grow only after first seeing themselves and accepting themselves.”
Industry Talks
How to Dive into Consumer Goods?
Alumni Dialogues
Your Major, Door To World Beyond - IMA & IMB
Your Major, Door To World Beyond - Humanities And Social Science
Your Major, Door To World Beyond - Business & Finance
Your Major, Door To World Beyond - STEM
Social Impact Panels
Know Before You Go: Activating your International Organization Journey
Global Awards x Big Talk: Forging Deeper Connections for Greater Impact
Combining Academic Learning with Service
Get More Engaged: Service Learning and New Possibilities in Volunteering
Individuals in Action: How Professionals in Different Fields Respond to COVID
Organization Info Sessions
Organization Info Sessions: Accessibility Research Association
Organization Info Sessions: Teach for China
Organization Info Sessions: Future China
Career Workshops
Digital Career Toolkit - Violet Network
Digital Career Toolkit - Goin Global

What is the I AM LIMITLESS Conference?
Key notes
How To Build Your Social Impact Career？
Speaker: Fan Zhang, CSR expert, former Director, CSR and sustainability at Kuaishou

“As a college student at school, you have much room to try and make mistakes. You can start from small, such as organize movie clubs, seminars and try all sorts of different things according to your interests. In such a process, organizational skills, leadership, communication skills and ability to integrate resources will be fully exercised.”
Social Impact In The Era Of COVID 19: Finding Innovative Solutions To Improve Global Health Access
Speaker: Chang Liu, Regional Director for Greater China and Southeast Asia at ACCESS Health International.

“Positive reinforcement is the key. I really encourage you to build up a positive personal story about yourself and about the others in your life, and keep telling those positive stories to yourself and to others.”
Connecting The Dots: Fostering Intercultural Understanding Through Travel
Speaker: Yu Gong, Partner, Daocaoren (稻草人)Travel Group

“A core aspect of traveling is to create connections between you and yourself. The connection is a continuous process of breaking the old, learning the new and finally gaining the power to grow. People can grow only after first seeing themselves and accepting themselves.”
